product_overview: Smart Class is a biometric attendance platform for classrooms that lets teachers manage attendance digitally and lets students enroll using face and voice samples. It replaces manual roll calls with AI-assisted recognition and secure teacher access.
core_goals: Let teachers create an account and access the teacher dashboard
Let students enroll themselves for biometric attendance registration
Let teachers record attendance by uploading a classroom photo and reviewing recognized students

features.name: Teacher Registration
features.description: Teachers create an account with a username, name, and password so they can access the teacher portal.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Choose the Teacher Portal entry point -> Open registration -> Provide username, name, and password -> Submit the registration form -> See confirmation of successful account creation

features.name: Biometric Student Registration
features.description: Students enroll in the system by submitting their name and capturing face and voice samples for attendance matching.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Choose the Student Portal entry point -> Provide name -> Capture a face sample using the camera -> Capture a voice sample using the microphone -> Submit the enrollment information -> See that the student profile has been registered

features.name: AI Attendance via Photo
features.description: Teachers log in, choose a subject, upload a classroom photo, and review the students detected for attendance logging.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Access the Teacher Portal -> Log in with teacher credentials -> Select a subject -> Upload a classroom photo -> Review the detected students -> Confirm the attendance record has been created

routes.description: Landing page with Teacher/Student entry points
Teacher dashboard for class management and attendance
Student portal for enrollment and biometric registration

features.name: Teacher Registration
features.description: Teachers can create accounts with a username and password

features.name: Biometric Student Registration
features.description: Students register their face and voice samples for AI attendance
user_interactions: Use camera to capture face sample
Use microphone to capture voice sample

features.name: AI Attendance via Photo
features.description: Teacher uploads a classroom photo to automatically log attendance

known_limitations.issue: Face recognition requires good lighting for high accuracy
known_limitations.impact: Low lighting may lead to false negatives in attendance logs
